title: soundfiler
description: read and write tables to soundfiles

messages.description: sets a filename to open and optionally one or more arrays to load channels
sets a filename to write and one or more arrays to specify channels
number of samples (when reading a file)
sample rate, header size, number of channels, bytes per sample & endianness (when reading a file)

methods.description: 'sets a filename to open and optionally one or more arrays to load channels. optional flags: -wave, -aiff, -caf, -next, -skip <float>, -maxsize <float>, -ascii, -raw <list>'
'sets a filename to write and one or more arrays to specify channels. optional flags: -wave, -aiff, -caf, -next, -big, -little, -skip <float>, -nframes <float>, -ascii, -normalize, -rate <float>'
